channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: Robots - OT - CVSS Score v4 - 9.8
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | Universal Robots PolyScope controls collaborative robots; OS command injection in Dashboard Server allows unauthenticated code execution on robot OS.

item.title: PHP - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.5
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.5 | PHP Group PHP: Server-side scripting language; SOAP extension use-after-free flaw in object deduplication allows remote code execution via crafted request.

item.title: Sentry - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Sentry monitors errors and performance; versions 21.12.0 to <26.4.1 have a SAML SSO flaw allowing account takeover via malicious IdP with known email address.

item.title: Angular - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Angular is a web app platform using TypeScript/JavaScript. SSRF in @angular/platform-server misleads URL origin, exposing internal APIs; fixed in 21.2.9. More info....

item.title: Dirty Frag - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - -
item.description: Monday 11 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - - | Dirty Frag" lets local Linux users manipulate page cache and gain root across many kernel versions. No Sophos products are affected.

item.title: Palo Alto - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Palo Alto Networks Prisma Access firewall management system; buffer overflow in User-ID Authentication Portal allows unauthenticated root code execution via crafted packets.

item.title: gotenburg - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Gotenberg Docker API for PDF processing; vuln allows injection via metadata values, enabling file rename, overwrite, or link creation in container.

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Apache Wicket is a Java web application framework; it has a session fixation vulnerability due to missing changeSessionId call.

item.title: Cisco - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Cisco Unity Connection is a unified messaging system; an authenticated attacker can execute root code via crafted API requests. More info....

item.title: jupyter - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.4
item.description: Thursday 07 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.4 | JupyterLab and Notebook provide interactive computing; XSS in help command linker lets attackers steal tokens, hijack sessions, run code.

item.title: OWASP - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Wednesday 06 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | ModSecurity WAF engine for Apache, IIS, Nginx; libModSecurity3 <3.0.15 crashes on t:hexDecode with single char, causing denial of service.

item.title: OpenClaw - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.6
item.description: Wednesday 06 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | OpenClaw event management system; input validation flaw allows malicious hooks to escalate untrusted input to higher-trust agent context.

item.title: PHPOffice - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Wednesday 06 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | PHPOffice PhpSpreadsheet reads/writes spreadsheet files; user-controlled filename in IOFactory::load() allows remote code execution or SSRF via PHP stream wrappers.

item.title: OpenEMR - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Wednesday 06 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | OpenEMR 7.0.1 is an electronic medical records system; it has a brute force flaw allowing unlimited login attempts bypassing rate limits. More info....

item.title: pi-hole - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Wednesday 06 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Pi-hole Faster than Light blocks ads and trackers at network level; versions before 6.6.1 allow command execution via config injection without admin password.

item.title: Qualcomm - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 5.5-9.8
item.description: Tuesday 05 May 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 5.5-9.8 | Monthly - Number of patches: 10 Number of critical patches: 3

item.title: Android - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 05 May 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Monthly - Number of patches: 1 Number of critical patches: 1

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.9
item.description: Tuesday 05 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.9 | Apache Polaris manages cloud data storage; altering write.metadata.path bypasses checks, risking metadata writes to attacker-chosen locations.

item.title: n8n - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Tuesday 05 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | n8n-io n8n automates workflows; versions before 1.123.32, 2.17.4 allow prototype pollution via XML, enabling remote code execution. More info....

item.title: Ollama - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.1
item.description: Tuesday 05 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.1 | Ollama AI model management tool; heap out-of-bounds read in GGUF loader leaks sensitive data via unauthenticated /api/create and /api/push endpoints.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.3
item.description: Tuesday 05 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.3 | Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform automates IT tasks; flaw in auto-linking IDP emails allows attackers to hijack or access accounts without verification.

item.title: bitwarden - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 30 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Bitwarden CLI manages password vaults via command line; version 2026.4.0 from npm contained embedded malicious code in a supply chain attack.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 30 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | IBM Langflow Desktop is a workflow automation tool; versions 1.0.0 to 1.8.4 allow arbitrary command execution risking data exposure and attacks.

item.title: MeWare - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Thursday 30 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | MeWare PDKS is an access control system; it has an authorization bypass via user-controlled key allowing privilege abuse in versions before VMYR_3.5.2025117. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: Fortinet - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Wednesday 29 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | A improper access control vulnerability in Fortinet FortiClientEMS 7.4.5 through 7.4.6 may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via crafted requests.

item.title: NVIDIA - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Wednesday 29 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | NVIDIA FLARE SDK manages federated learning; NVFlare Dashboard flaw allows unauthenticated users to bypass authorization, risking data and code.

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Wednesday 29 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Apache Pony Mail is an email list management tool; HTTP request smuggling flaw allows admin takeover in unsupported Lua versions.

item.title: Cisco - Patch - CVSS Score 9.1-10.
item.description: Wednesday 29 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score 9.1-10. | Nutanix Cisco Intersight Device Connector links Nutanix Prism Central to Cisco Intersight; improper access control on API port 7373 allows unauthenticated attackers to disrupt workloads by invoking cluster maintenance, risking service availability. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained Definitions - Severity GUARDED This alert state represents the return towards normalisation of an alert state, indicating that there was a higher alert state due to a product vulnerability during the previous few days. INCREASED This alert state indicates that a product vulnerability has been identified within the last few days. The vulnerability is either difficult to exploit, or if exploited, results in reduced impact to the target system. This alert state indicates a more serious vulnerability which is exploitable. CRITICAL This alert state indicates a significant threat to the product, where exploits exist or where the vulnerability is potentially devastating.

item.title: Definitions - Type - Monthly - N/A
item.description: Wednesday 29 April 2026 | Monthly | N/A | Vendors of cyber security products should know better and given their importance they are highlighted when vulnerable, often combined with critival severity +24hrs This bottom descriptor is used with Indicates an alert state which has been present for more than 24 hours. This bottom descriptor indicates that patches are available for vulnerabilities, whether it is the initial report or a patch of a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that an Exploit has been made public for a vulnerability, whether it is the initial report or an indication of an exploit for a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that the vulnerable product is Operational Technology (OT) such as an Industrial Control System (ICS). OT is not to be confused with Information Technology (IT) This bottom descriptor indicates that a vulnerability has been announced without the opportunity for the vendor to patch it before the details are made known. Whilst vulnerabilities reported are remotely exploitable, there are rare occasions when we will report on a vulnerability with a locally exploitable attack vector (AV:L) Several vendors release multiple patches on or around the same day each month. The severity level will reflect the highest vulnerability © Computer Network Defence Limited 2026 Privacy Notice Terms & Conditions Send us a Message
